commands.review_summary:
The branch tightens Policy plugin `policy.jsonc` validation, adds policy compare/data-handling/ingress/sandbox conformance surfaces, and updates policy docs/tests.

PR surface: Source +4235, Tests +3747, Docs +59. Total +8041 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: `policy compare` collects container/scoped/metadata invalid findings but does not include the separate top-level data-handling shape checks. I did not run the CLI because this review was constrained to read-only inspection.
